help.title: Help
help.heroSub: Everything you need to know to make the most of Readigma.
help.contactSub: Write to us, our team usually replies within 48h.

faq.q: How do I add a book to my library?
faq.a: In "Discover" or "Search", tap a book to see its details, then choose its status: To read, Reading, or Read.

faq.q: How do I track my reading progress?
faq.a: Open a book from your library, then use the timer or the "Update" button to log your current page or percentage.

faq.q: How do I follow other readers?
faq.a: Go to Profile → Following & followers → "Search" tab. Type a username and tap "Follow" — no acceptance needed.
The feed shows activity from readers you follow. Start by following some via the "Following & followers" section in your profile.

faq.q: How do I set a reading goal?
faq.a: Profile → Reading Goal. You can choose a number of books to read this year and track your progress month by month.
In the Discover tab, this button picks a random book from your "To read" pile. You need books in that list for it to work.

faq.q: How do I react to my reading?
faq.a: On a book's detail page, you can add reactions (emoji + note) at any page. They show up in your followers' feed.
Make sure you've allowed notifications for Readigma in your phone's settings. Push notifications arrive as soon as someone starts following you.

sections.title: Data we collect
sections.body: Readigma stores your email address, username, profile picture, library (books, statuses, ratings, comments), reading reactions, reading time, yearly goals, and your follow relationships with other users (who you follow, who follows you).

sections.title: How we use your data
sections.body: This data is used solely to run the app: displaying your library, your feed, your reading stats, and the profiles of readers you follow. Readigma never sells or shares your data with third parties for advertising purposes.

sections.title: Visibility of your information
sections.body: Your username, avatar, library, and book reviews are visible to any signed-in user. Your activity feed (finished books, reactions, progress updates), however, is only visible to the people who follow you.

sections.title: External services
sections.body: Book covers and information come from Open Library, the Bibliothèque nationale de France (BnF), and Google Books. Readigma uses Supabase for data hosting and authentication, and Expo for push notifications.

sections.title: Retention and deletion
sections.body: Your data is kept for as long as your account exists. To delete your account and all your data, write to us from the Help & Contact page.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body: You can request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us via Profile → Help & Contact.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
sections.body: By creating a Readigma account, you agree to these terms of use. If you don't agree, please don't use the app.

sections.title: 2. Your account
sections.body: You're responsible for keeping your credentials confidential and for the accuracy of the information you provide (username, email). One account per person.

sections.title: 3. Content you post
sections.body: Your comments, ratings, reactions, and messages remain your property, but you allow Readigma to display them to other users according to your privacy settings (e.g. visibility to followers). You agree not to post any illegal, abusive content, or content that infringes on others' rights.

sections.title: 4. Book catalog
sections.body: Book information (titles, covers, descriptions) comes from third-party sources (Open Library, BnF, Google Books) and is provided for informational purposes. Readigma doesn't guarantee its accuracy.

sections.title: 5. Expected behavior
sections.body: Harassment, spam, and impersonation are prohibited. An account violating these rules may be suspended or deleted without notice.

sections.title: 6. Service availability
sections.body: Readigma is provided "as is", with no guarantee of continuous availability. Interruptions or changes to the service may occur at any time.

sections.title: 7. Changes
sections.body: These terms may be updated. Significant changes will be communicated through the app.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.body: For any question, write to us from Profile → Help & Contact.

suggestBook.title: Suggest a book
suggestBook.heroSub: Fill in its details and suggest it to the admin so it gets added to Readigma.
suggestBook.sentMessage: Suggestion sent! The admin will review it soon.

importGoodreads.title: Import from Goodreads
importGoodreads.heroSub: On Goodreads: My Books → Tools → Import/Export → "Export Library". Then choose the downloaded .csv file below.
importGoodreads.importedCount_one: {{count}} book added to your library, all in e-reader format.
importGoodreads.importedCount_other: {{count}} books added to your library, all in e-reader format.
importGoodreads.note: Status (to read / reading / read), rating, and series are taken directly from your Goodreads export. Re-importing the same file later won't create duplicates.

editBookSuggestion.hint: Only fill in what you want to fix or add — the rest of the book's info won't change.

admin.title: Administration
admin.banConfirmWeb: Ban @{{username}}? They will no longer be able to log in.
admin.banConfirmMessage: @{{username}} will no longer be able to log in to Readigma.
admin.missingInfoDesc: Looks up missing cover, summary, genres, and ISBN (Hardcover, Open Library, Google Books, Wikidata) for every catalog book that's missing one.
admin.repopulateDesc: Sweeps the entire catalog: replaces each cover with the one found via Hardcover first (even if the book already has one), and fills in missing summary/genres/ISBN only.
admin.backfillDone_one: {{count}} book completed out of {{total}} that was missing something (cover, summary, or genres).
admin.backfillDone_other: {{count}} books completed out of {{total}} that were missing something (cover, summary, or genres).
admin.repopulateConfirmMessage: Replaces every book's cover (even ones that already have one) with the one found via Hardcover first, and fills in missing summary/genres. Can take a while.
admin.editingSuggestionBanner: You're editing a suggestion — the author will be notified once it's added.

welcome.title:
Welcome to
Readigma
welcome.desc: Your reading companion. Track your progress, discover new books, and share your reading journey.

discover.title:
Discover
your next book
discover.desc: Not sure what to read? Readigma picks from your 'To read' pile and makes a random suggestion.

library.title:
Manage your
library
library.desc: Organize your books by status: To read, Reading, Finished, or DNF. Customize your shelf by moving books around and adding photo frames.

decorations.title:
Unlock
decorations
decorations.desc: Your library starts with 4 decoration slots. Earn reading badges (books finished, day streaks, genres explored...) to unlock even more.

reactions.title:
Real-time
reactions
reactions.desc: Track your emotions as you read with emojis and notes. Build your reader logbook.

friends.title:
Follow other
readers
friends.desc: Follow readers you're interested in, see what they're reading, and share your favorites in the feed.
